{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/86631197?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/tempcollab", "id": 86631197, "login": "tempcollab", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg2NjMxMTk3", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-50015", "cvss": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "## Summary

pnpm's patch application pipeline (`@pnpm/patch-package`) performs no path validation on file paths extracted from `.patch` files. An attacker who contributes a malicious patch file via a pull request can write attacker-controlled content to or delete arbitrary files on the filesystem during `pnpm install`, as the user running the install. The `diff --git` header paths containing `../../` sequences traverse out of the package directory, and the traversal is difficult to catch in code review because patch file diff headers are opaque to most reviewers.

## Vulnerability Details

During `pnpm install`, when a `patchedDependencies` entry is present in `pnpm-workspace.yaml`, pnpm reads the referenced `.patch` file and applies it via the embedded `@pnpm/patch-package` library. The `applyPatchToDir` function at `patching/apply-patch/src/index.ts:12-13` calls `process.chdir(opts.patchedDir)`, setting the working directory to the installed package location deep inside `node_modules/.pnpm/`.

The patch parser at `@pnpm/patch-package/dist/patch/parse.js:88` extracts file paths from `diff --git a/(.*?) b/(.*?)` headers using a regex with no path sanitization. The `executeEffects` function in `apply.js` then operates on these unsanitized paths:

**File write** (`apply.js:35-49`):
```javascript
case 'file creation': {
  const eff = effect
  fs.ensureDirSync(dirname(eff.path))
  fs.writeFileSync(eff.path, fileContents, { mode: eff.mode })
  break
}
```

**File delete** (`apply.js:13-22`):
```javascript
case 'file deletion': {
  const eff = effect
  // TODO: integrity checks
  if (!opts.dryRun) {
    fs.unlinkSync(eff.path)
  }
  break
}
```

A path like `../../../../../../../../../../home/user/.ssh/authorized_keys` in the patch header traverses out of the package directory to an arbitrary location.

## Proof of Concept

```bash
# Write variant:
bash autofyn_audit/exploits/vuln6_patch_traversal_write/exploit.sh
# Result: PASS -- /tmp/vuln6_pwned created with attacker-controlled content

# Delete variant:
bash autofyn_audit/exploits/vuln7_patch_traversal_delete/exploit.sh
# Result: PASS -- /tmp/vuln7_target deleted by malicious patch

# Combined chain (delete + replace SSH authorized_keys):
bash autofyn_audit/exploits/chain2_patch_ssh_backdoor/exploit.sh
# Result: PASS -- authorized_keys replaced with attacker's public key
```

## Impact

Arbitrary file write and delete as the user running `pnpm install`, limited to paths writable by that user. An attacker who submits a PR adding a `.patch` file and `patchedDependencies` config can target SSH authorized_keys, shell configuration, CI/CD files, or other writable files. Patch files may receive less review scrutiny than `package.json` changes because the `../` traversal sequences are in `diff --git` headers that look like patch metadata.

## Suggested Remediation

Validate parsed patch file paths against the package root directory. Reject any path that resolves outside the patched package directory via `path.resolve` + prefix check. Alternatively, sanitize at parse time by rejecting paths containing `..` components in `parse.js`.

---

> Discovered by [AutoFyn](https://github.com/SignalPilot-Labs/AutoFyn)
> Full audit report: [audit_report.md](https://github.com/tempcollab/pnpm/blob/main/autofyn_audit/audit_report.md)
> Exploit script: [exploit.sh](https://github.com/tempcollab/pnpm/blob/main/autofyn_audit/exploits/vuln6_patch_traversal_write/exploit.sh)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0027, "percentile": 0.18553}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rxhj-4m44-96r4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T22:59:48Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rxhj-4m44-96r4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rxhj-4m44-96r4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50015"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-25T18:16:39Z", "published_at": "2026-06-26T22:59:48Z", "references": ["https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm/security/advisories/GHSA-rxhj-4m44-96r4", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-50015", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rxhj-4m44-96r4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/pnpm/pnpm/security-advisories/GHSA-rxhj-4m44-96r4", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm", "summary": "pnpm Vulnerable to Arbitrary File Write/Delete via Malicious Patch File (Path Traversal)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T22:59:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rxhj-4m44-96r4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "10.34.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "pnpm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 10.34.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "11.4.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "pnpm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 11.0.0, < 11.4.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pnpm Vulnerable to Arbitrary File Write/Delete via Malicious Patch File (Path Traversal)
